title: Kuma Strikes Saturn
description: On pages 11–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Luffy, Unknown person #11, Marines, Dorry, Kuma as Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.
scene: Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: JEGAPUNK!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've gotta go! We'll die if we stay here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Vwoom

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Creak

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: that rhythm...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Nika?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right. I've always looked up to him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They say Nina would come along laughing to this rhythm...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Don-do- to-to »

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Don-do- to-to »

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I knew it... you haven't connected the dots yet, have you, Bonney?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya hya

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I had to see it with my own eyes.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy. The young boy who caught Kuma's eye,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Is "Sun God" Nika!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: How?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Kuma was right!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A buster call is a tame problem for him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: People all over the world have been awaiting his arrival...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: For hundreds of years!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Northeast Coast of Egghead

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the North- Eastern Unit, come in!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've made contact with an insanely big ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought they died a hundred years ago, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...there's no doubt it's them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Why aren't they stopping?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the heck are they even doing here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We're gonna crash!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: They're coming right for us!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: fire!!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Damn it!! Why're you giants here?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't they know some things in this world can't be stopped?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gaba BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's an emergency!! The giant pirates are here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GEGYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GUA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Or should we call him the sun God!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: A giant glimpse of hope finally arrives!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Buster Call through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
